meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't validate ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't validate ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template for Freelancers: Validate Ideas Faster
content.seo_description: Stop guessing. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to validate your SaaS ideas in hours, not weeks. A beginner-friendly technical guide.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template replaces manual boilerplate with a modular, AI-ready architecture. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate the scaffolding process, allowing you to deploy functional MVPs in hours. This workflow eliminates the 'blank page' syndrome, ensuring your client projects are validated, production-ready, and scalable from day one.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blinking cursor, the weight of a client’s vision pressing down on your shoulders. You know the idea is solid, but the path from abstract requirement to working deployment feels like a slog through quicksand. Most freelancers burn their profit margins in the 'setup phase,' manually configuring auth, databases, and API routes while the clock ticks away.

It’s time to stop reinventing the wheel. The Antigravity template provides a high-velocity foundation that abstracts the plumbing, letting you focus on the business logic that actually converts. When you combine this with Claude Code’s autonomous execution, you aren't just coding—you're orchestrating a high-speed development machine.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base directory structure and environment configuration to ensure strict type safety and modularity immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard layout, including Next.js, Supabase integration, and Tailwind CSS configuration.

steps.title: Define the Schema for Validation
steps.description: Use the template's schema generator to create a database model that supports rapid iteration based on client feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS MVP with users, subscriptions, and project entities, ensuring RLS policies are enabled.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate the Supabase migration files based on this schema definition'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to build out the backend endpoints, reducing manual boilerplate for CRUD operations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure API routes for the project entities defined in the schema, including input validation using Zod.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the unique features of the application by feeding specific requirements into the pre-configured service layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core business logic for user dashboard metrics, calculating project progress based on active tasks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement the dashboard service layer logic'

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Setup
steps.description: Configure the deployment pipeline to ensure every iteration is live and ready for client review within seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Vercel deployment settings and integrate GitHub Actions for automated testing and production builds.

pro_tips: Always use Zod schemas in your Antigravity templates to enforce data integrity at the edge before hitting your database.
Utilize Claude Code's '--watch' mode to auto-apply linting fixes whenever you modify component files.
Keep your database migrations small and idempotent; split them by feature to avoid complex merge conflicts during team collaboration.
Use mock data generators early in the cycle to validate UI components before the actual backend integration is finalized.
Leverage the Antigravity 'Service-Repository' pattern to decouple your business logic from your data access layer for easier unit testing.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, gather feedback from your client using a live demo link, then use Claude Code to iterate on user-requested features within the existing template structure.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start shipping products that actually sell. Your clients pay for results, not setup time. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
